headline.primary_headline: WITH MACULAR DEGENERATION YOU MAY NOT KNOW YOUR VISION IS GOING UNTIL THERE'S NO GOING BACK.
headline.promise_compression: Your vision could be disappearing right now and you wouldn't know it

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: Am I losing my vision without knowing it?

schema_analysis.existing_schema: I would notice if my vision was getting worse
schema_analysis.new_schema: Macular degeneration progresses silently until it's too late
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Fear of irreversible loss + National Eye Institute authority + clinical proof

headline.vsl_adaptation: Right now, your vision could be fading away. And you might not even know it. Because macular degeneration is silent. By the time you notice something's wrong... there's no going back...

lead.opening_verbatim: WITH MACULAR DEGENERATION YOU MAY NOT KNOW YOUR VISION IS GOING UNTIL THERE'S NO GOING BACK.
lead.transition_to_body: ONLY PreserVision AREDS 2 contains the exact levels of clinically proven nutrients...

mechanism.mechanism_description: PreserVision AREDS 2 contains the exact levels of clinically proven nutrients (lutein, zeaxanthin, omega-3 fatty acids) recommended by the National Eye Institute based on the AREDS2 clinical trial to help reduce the risk of macular degeneration progression.
mechanism.authority_source: National Eye Institute / JAMA published study

proof_elements.verbatim: recommended by the National Eye Institute
Age-Related Eye Disease Study 2 (AREDS2) randomized clinical trial. JAMA. 2013
ONLY PreserVision AREDS 2 contains the exact levels

key_sections.content_verbatim: ONLY PreserVision AREDS 2 contains the exact levels of clinically proven nutrients recommended by the National Eye Institute to help reduce the risk of progression for people with moderate to advanced Macular Degeneration.

Age-Related Eye Disease Study 2 Research Group. Lutein + zeaxanthin and omega-3 fatty acids for age-related macular degeneration: the Age-Related Eye Disease Study 2 (AREDS2) randomized clinical trial. JAMA. 2013 May 15;309(19):2005-15.

offer.cta: Ask your doctor if PreserVision AREDS 2 Formula is right for you

metadata.source_file: PreserVision 2014-2018 (3 Stars) Brilliant Power of Demonstration.md

richs_formula_elements.old_way: Wait until you notice vision problems, then treat

temporal_analysis.market_conditions: Aging population awareness of macular degeneration

copywriting_techniques.demonstration_innovation: Can't show vision loss, so demonstrates the FEAR of silent loss

notable_elements: The headline is a masterclass in fear demonstration
AREDS2 study is legitimate clinical research
Coupon format with $4 savings drives retail trial
extraction_notes.key_insight: When you can't demonstrate the problem (invisible vision loss), demonstrate the FEAR of the problem. 'You may not know... until there's no going back' is pure psychological demonstration.
